relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: A door opens in heaven and the trumpet-voice says, Come up.
In Spirit, John sees the throne and the One seated.
Gem-light and emerald rainbow surround the throne.
Twenty-four elders sit crowned in white.
Lightning, voices, thunder, and seven Spirit-lamps flow from the throne.
Before the throne is glass-sea and eye-filled living presence.
Lion, ox, human, and eagle gather creation's faces.
Day and night the living creatures cry holy, holy, holy.
Glory and thanks rise to the Living One.
Elders fall and cast crowns before the throne.
Creation sings the worth of the One who willed all things.

contemplative_note: Revelation 4 is worship before all else: creation, elders, creatures, crowns, and the throne of holy source.
